name: devflow-cli
description: Generic dev workflow CLI — Trello + Git + GitHub integration for any project

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{cpSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs'),{resolve}=require('path');const root=process.env.INIT_CWD||process.cwd();const b=resolve(__dirname,'.claude');const t=resolve(root,'.claude');try{mkdirSync(resolve(t,'commands'),{recursive:true});mkdirSync(resolve(t,'skills'),{recursive:true});cpSync(resolve(b,'commands'),resolve(t,'commands'),{recursive:true});cpSync(resolve(b,'skills'),resolve(t,'skills'),{recursive:true});console.log('✅ devflow-cli: .claude/commands + skills copied to',t)}catch(e){console.warn('⚠️ devflow-cli postinstall:',e.message)}"
